EntitySearchMode Enumeration

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public enum EntitySearchMode
Members
  Member nameValueDescription
Default0 The search result set is loaded first, and the result set are used to filter the database result set.
SearchAfterLoad1The database result set is loaded first, and the search operates on that result set.
LoadCached2 The search result set and database result sets are individually loaded, cached, and processed in-memory.
